title: cacalia latipes
intro: Cacalia latipes, also known as Japanese Cacalia or Japanese Wild Lettuce, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, thanks to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Cacalia latipes can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Japanese medicine.
